title: Nested Rows/Cols
description: Arrange multiple widgets in a complex layout using Rows inside a Column.
problemStatement:
Layouts are hierarchical. Build a `Column` that contains:
1. A `Text` widget with a title.
2. A `Row` containing two icons: `Icons.star` and `Icons.favorite`.

**Requirement:** Align the items to the `start` of the column.
expectedOutput: A vertical layout with a title text followed by a row of two icons.
